title: Circle Exploring Arc Network Token Launch, Proof-of-Stake Shift
message_html: Circle Exploring Arc Network Token Launch, Proof-of-Stake Shift ...
snippet: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire reiterated plans for its stablecoin-focused layer-1 blockchain to launch in mainnet “soon.”

title: Tether launches self-custodial wallet with cloud backup option
message_html: Tether launches self-custodial wallet with cloud backup option ...
snippet: Tether launches tether.wallet, a self-custodial app supporting USDT, XAUT, USAT and Bitcoin with cloud-based key backup features.
